hooks.rewakeMessage: A git push just completed on this branch.
hooks.rewakeSummary: git push detected — checking PR description

hooks.command: echo '{"systemMessage": "Reminder: if code changed this session, update CLAUDE.md — What'\''s implemented and What'\''s not implemented yet — before closing.", "hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY: Before this session closes, update the '\''What'\''s implemented'\'' and '\''What'\''s not implemented yet'\'' sections of CLAUDE.md to reflect actual current state. Read source files to verify — do not rely on memory. This keeps the next agent oriented."}}'
